title: Xtra Cozy Norwegian Cheese Casserole
description: A yeasty, pillowy, and cozy Norwegian dish featuring shredded Monterey Jack cheese, perfect for a cold winter night. This low-fat friendly casserole is baked in a ramekin for a delightful individual serving.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, combine the yeast, sugar, and warm milk, stirring to dissolve the yeast.
Let the yeast mixture sit for 5 minutes, or until it becomes frothy.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, salt, and shredded cheese.
Add the egg, melted butter, and yeast mixture to the dry ingredients, stirring until a smooth batter forms.
Pour the batter into a ramekin, filling it to the top.
Bake the casserole for 25 minutes, or until it is puffed and golden brown.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
